channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PREMIERPOL] Premier Polyfilm Ltd Receives Disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI from Promoter Group Company D L Millar & Co Ltd
item.description:
Premier Polyfilm Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from D L Millar & Co Ltd, a promoter group company. D L Millar & Co Ltd has acquired 0.03% (31,208 equity shares) of Premier Polyfilm Ltd through open market as of 02-03-2026. This acquisition was made through the BSE and NSE.

  • Premier Polyfilm Ltd received disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI from promoter group company D L Millar & Co Ltd
  • D L Millar & Co Ltd acquired 0.03% (31,208 equity shares) of Premier Polyfilm Ltd through open market
  • The acquisition was made through BSE and NSE on 02-03-2026
  • This is a significant development in the acquisitions category

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PREMIER POLYFILM LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [STEELXIND] Steel Exchange India Ltd Approves Issue of up to 36,14,60,300 Convertible Warrants at a Premium of Rs 8.45 Each
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Steel Exchange India Ltd has approved the issue of up to 36,14,60,300 convertible warrants having a face value of Re.1 each, at an issue price of Rs 9.45 (with a premium of Re.8.45) on a preferential basis. The warrants will be issued for cash consideration and the total consideration will not exceed Rs.350,00,00,000. The warrants will be allotted to seven investors including promoters and non-promoters. The warrants will carry a right to subscribe 1 (one) Equity Share each, which may be exercised in one or more tranches during the period commencing from the date of allotment of warrants until the expiry of 18 (eighteen) months from the date of allotment. The Board also approved the Notice of 1stExtraordinary General Meeting for FY 2025-26 and matters related thereto, and the proposal for modification and/or change in the terms and conditions of the listed Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) issued by the Company.

  • Issue of up to 36,14,60,300 convertible warrants at a premium of Rs 8.45 each
  • Total consideration not to exceed Rs.350,00,00,000
  • Seven investors including promoters and non-promoters
  • Warrants to carry a right to subscribe 1 (one) Equity Share each
  • Warrants can be exercised in one or more tranches within 18 months from the date of allotment

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STEEL EXCHANGE INDIA LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [PREMIERPOL] Promoter Group Company, D L Millar & Co Ltd, Acquires 0.03% Stake in Premier Polyfilm Ltd
item.description:
On March 2, 2026, D L Millar & Co Ltd, a promoter group company of Premier Polyfilm Limited, acquired 31,208 equity shares of Premier Polyfilm Limited, representing 0.03% of the total shareholding, through open market transactions on BSE Limited and NSE Limited. This acquisition is in accordance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • D L Millar & Co Ltd, a promoter group company, acquires 0.03% stake in Premier Polyfilm Limited
  • The acquisition comprises 31,208 equity shares through open market transactions
  • Transaction took place on BSE Limited and NSE Limited on March 2, 2026
  • This acquisition adheres to Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PREMIER POLYFILM LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [STEELXIND] Steel Exchange India Ltd: Promoters Release Shares Encumbered for Debt Repayment
item.description:
Steel Exchange India Ltd has received disclosures from its promoters regarding the encumbrance of their shares in the company. The disclosures were made under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The promoters, Kiran, Bandi Jaya, Padmavathi, Satish Kumar, Bandi, Bavineni Suresh, Bandi Ramesh, Kumar, Bandi Arunakanthi, and Sudha, have released a significant portion of their encumbered shares. The release of shares was primarily for debt repayment and collateral purposes. The total number of shares released by all promoters combined is 52,279,640, which is approximately 4.12% of the total share capital.

  • Promoters release encumbered shares for debt repayment and collateral purposes
  • Total of 52,279,640 shares released, approximately 4.12% of total share capital
  • Majority of promoters involved in the share release
  • Shares released on 26th February 2026
  • Disclosures made under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STEEL EXCHANGE INDIA LTD. | Category: Buyback

item.title: [SYSCHEM] Promoter Ranjan Jain Sells Shares of Syschem India Ltd on Open Market
item.description:
Ranjan Jain, a promoter of Syschem India Limited, has disclosed the sale of shares under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The sale took place on the open market between February 27, 2026, and March 2, 2026. The total shares sold by Ranjan Jain amounted to 0.069% of the total shares and 0.053% of the total voting capital of the company.

  • Ranjan Jain, a promoter of Syschem India Limited, sold shares on the open market
  • The sale took place between February 27, 2026, and March 2, 2026
  • The total shares sold amounted to 0.069% of the total shares
  • The sale represented 0.053% of the total voting capital of the company
  • The sale was disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SYSCHEM (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Sale

item.title: [STEELXIND] Steel Exchange India Ltd. Approves Issue of up to 36,14,60,300 Convertible Warrants at Rs 9.45 Each
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Steel Exchange India Ltd. has approved the issuance of up to 36,14,60,300 convertible warrants having a face value of Re.1/- each, at an issue price of Rs 9.45 /- with a premium of Rs 8.45 per warrant. The total consideration for this preferential issue is not exceeding Rs.350,00,00,000. The warrants will be allotted to seven investors, including promoters and non-promoters, and will be exercisable within 18 months from the date of allotment. The company also approved the Notice of 1stExtraordinary General Meeting for FY 2025-26 and matters related thereto, and the proposal for modification and/or change in the terms and conditions of the listed Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) issued by the Company.

  • Issue of up to 36,14,60,300 convertible warrants at Rs 9.45 each with a premium of Rs 8.45
  • Total consideration not exceeding Rs.350,00,00,000
  • 7 investors including promoters and non-promoters
  • Warrants exercisable within 18 months from the date of allotment
  • Approval of Notice of 1stExtraordinary General Meeting for FY 2025-26 and matters related thereto
  • Approval of proposal for modification and/or change in the terms and conditions of the listed Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STEEL EXCHANGE INDIA LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [VERANDA] Promoters of Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd Create Pledge Over Shares
item.description:
Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd promoters, Kalpathi S. Aghoram, Kalpathi S. Ganesh, and Kalpathi S. Suresh, have created a pledge over their shares. The pledge is in favor of RBL Bank Limited and SBI Cap Trustee Company Limited, acting on behalf of City Union Bank Limited. The shares have been pledged as security for financial facilities availed/to be availed by Veranda XL Learning Solutions Private Limited and Veranda Learning Solutions Limited.

  • Promoters Kalpathi S. Aghoram, Kalpathi S. Ganesh, and Kalpathi S. Suresh create pledge over shares
  • Pledge in favor of RBL Bank Limited and SBI Cap Trustee Company Limited
  • Shares pledged as security for financial facilities availed/to be availed by Veranda XL Learning Solutions Private Limited and Veranda Learning Solutions Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd | Category: Pledge

item.title: [GMRP&UI] Creation of Encumbrance Over GMR Power and Urban Infra Shares for Securing New Debentures
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Catalyst Trusteeship Ltd, as Debenture Trustee, has created an encumbrance over 12,00,00,000 equity shares of GMR Power and Urban Infra Ltd, constituting 15.36% of the issued and paid-up equity share capital, by way of pledge through constructive delivery. This encumbrance secures INR 350,00,00,000 (Indian Rupees Three Hundred Fifty Crore only) of new debentures issued by GMR Sports Venture Private Limited. The existing debentures worth INR 1,000,00,00,000 (Indian Rupees One Thousand Crore only) continue to be secured by the same pledged shares.

  • Creation of encumbrance over 12,00,00,000 equity shares of GMR Power and Urban Infra Ltd.
  • Encumbrance secured new debentures worth INR 350,00,00,000 issued by GMR Sports Venture Private Limited.
  • Existing debentures worth INR 1,000,00,00,000 continue to be secured by the same pledged shares.
  • Catalyst Trusteeship Ltd acting as Debenture Trustee on behalf of Debenture Holders.
  • GMR Estate Management Private Limited as the Pledgor.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GMR Power and Urban Infra Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [GMRP&UI] GMR Estate Management Private Limited Extends Pledge on 12 Crore Shares of GMR Power And Urban Infra Limited
item.description:
GMR Estate Management Private Limited has extended an existing pledge to a new facility against 12 Crore Shares of GMR Power And Urban Infra Limited, which is 15.36% of the total share capital. This extension has resulted in a modification of the Security Cover / Asset Cover. The encumbrance is in favor of Catalyst Trusteeship Limited for the benefit of GMR Sports Venture Private Limited. The purpose of raising money is not specified and the borrowed amount is to be utilized for personal use by promoters and PACs.

  • GMR Estate Management Private Limited extends existing pledge to a new facility against 12 Crore Shares of GMR Power And Urban Infra Limited.
  • The encumbrance is in favor of Catalyst Trusteeship Limited for the benefit of GMR Sports Venture Private Limited.
  • The extension has resulted in a modification of the Security Cover / Asset Cover.
  • The borrowed amount is to be utilized for personal use by promoters and PACs.
  • The debt instrument is a secured, unrated, unlisted, redeemable and non-convertible debenture.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GMR Power and Urban Infra Ltd | Category: Pledge

item.title: [VERANDA] Veranda Learning Solutions: Promoters Release Shares Encumbrance After Debentures Redemption
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd. announced the release of encumbrance over shares held by promoters Kalpathi S. Aghoram, Kalpathi S. Ganesh, and Kalpathi S. Suresh. The encumbrance was due to an undertaking by the promoters to maintain a minimum shareholding of 26% of the paid-up equity share capital of VLS, following the redemption of Non-Convertible Debentures by Veranda Learning Solutions Limited and Veranda Race Learning Solutions Private Limited. The release of encumbrance affects 33.29% of the total diluted shares, or 3,18,69,650 shares.

  • Veranda Learning Solutions promoters release encumbrance over shares
  • Encumbrance due to an undertaking to maintain 26% shareholding
  • Redemption of Non-Convertible Debentures by Veranda Learning Solutions and Veranda Race Learning Solutions
  • Release affects 33.29% of total diluted shares
  • Catalyst Trusteeship Limited confirms satisfaction of underlying obligations and release of pledge

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd | Category: Pledge
